title: Manarcad Church
tagline: Manarcad Church — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Manarcad Church is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral, Manarcad, is cathedral located in Manarcad, about 9 km from the town of Kottayam in Kerala, India. It is a destination for people on annual pilgrimages for the uncanonical 8 Day Lent of the Virgin Mary. There are more than 5000 families in this parish.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Manarcaud
topPlaces.description: Manarcad (pronounced Ma - nar- cad) is a small town in Kottayam district of Kerala state, South India. It is known for the Manarcad Perunnal, the annual feast at the St.

topPlaces.name: Kumaranallur, Kozhikode
topPlaces.description: Kumaranallur is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Kottayam or locally known as JNV Vadavathoor is a boarding, co-educational school in Kottayam district of Kerala state in India. Navodaya Vidyalayas are funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development and administered by Navodaya Vidyalaya Smiti, an autonomous body under the ministry.

topPlaces.name: Payyappaddy
topPlaces.description: Payyappady is a small village in Puthuppally panchayat in Kottayam district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Vennimala
topPlaces.description: Vennimala is a small village located in Puthuppally Grama Panchayath of the Kottayam district in Kerala. Vennimala is 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) east of Kottayam.

topPlaces.name: Peroor
topPlaces.description: Peroor is a village in Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is located 3 km (1.8 mi) from the town Ettumanoor and contains more than five different settlement colonies.

topPlaces.name: Thalappara Kotta
topPlaces.description: Thalappara Kotta (തലപ്പാറ കോട്ട) and Villaliveera are closely related to Sabarimala rituals and ceremonies. According to myths, Manikanda on his journey to Sabarimala was accompanied by Villaliveera, the Thalappara chief.

topPlaces.name: Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam formerly IPC Theological Seminary, Kottayam (IPCTSK) also known as the Kottayam Theological Seminary, is a Pentecostal theological seminary situated in, Kottayam, Kerala, India. It provides undergraduate and postgraduate theological education in residential, distance and online modes, and operates under the auspices of the IPC Educational & Welfare Society in connection with the Indian Pentecostal Church of God.

Navodaya Vidyalayas are funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development and administered by Navodaya Vidyalaya Smiti, an autonomous body under the ministry.

Peroor is a village in Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is located 3 km (1.8 mi) from the town Ettumanoor and contains more than five different settlement colonies.

Thalappara Kotta (തലപ്പാറ കോട്ട) and Villaliveera are closely related to Sabarimala rituals and ceremonies. According to myths, Manikanda on his journey to Sabarimala was accompanied by Villaliveera, the Thalappara chief.

Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam formerly IPC Theological Seminary, Kottayam (IPCTSK) also known as the Kottayam Theological Seminary, is a Pentecostal theological seminary situated in, Kottayam, Kerala, India. It provides undergraduate and postgraduate theological education in residential, distance and online modes, and operates under the auspices of the IPC Educational & Welfare Society in connection with the Indian Pentecostal Church of God.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Manarcad Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Manarcad Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Manarcad Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (65 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (53 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Manarcad Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Manarcad Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Manarcad Church?
faq.a: Stays in Manarcad Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Manarcad Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manarcaud, Kumaranallur, Kozhikode, Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Kottayam, Payyappaddy, Vennimala.
